Trafalgar.text:
orthwesterly 4 to 6, occasionally 7 at first in east. In north, cyclonic 4 to 6, increasing 6 to gale 8, occasionally severe gale 9 for a time later in west.
Sea state
In south, moderate or rough, becoming rough or very rough. in north, occasionally moderate at first in east, otherwise rough or very rough, becoming very rough or high.
Weather
In south, thundery showers. In north, rain or thundery showers.
Visibility
In south, good. In north, good, occasionally poor.

FitzRoy.text:
Wind
In south, cyclonic 4 to 6, increasing 7 to severe gale 9 for a time west, becoming variable 3 or less later in east. In north, cyclonic 3 to 5, but northerly 6 to gale 8 at first in far west, becoming northeasterly 4 to 6 later.
Sea state
In south, rough or very rough, becoming high for a time in far southwest. in north, rough or very rough.
Weather
In south, rain or thundery showers. In north, showers, thundery, fog patches later.
Visibility
In south, good, occasionally poor. In north, moderate or good, occasionally very poor later.
